# Lonely Guy
> Lonely Guy (Greeshma Surya) - CS undergrad building autonomous robotic assistants through reinforcement learning, robotics, world models, and embodied AI. Projects, research, and technical writing on RL, systems, and LLM agents.

Lonely Guy is building toward autonomous robotic assistants through reinforcement learning, robotics, world models, embodied AI, LLM agents, and systems work.

## Navigation
- Home: https://lonelyguy.tech/
- Stack: https://lonelyguy.tech/stack
- Projects: https://lonelyguy.tech/projects
- Articles: https://lonelyguy.tech/articles
- Updates: https://lonelyguy.tech/updates
- Gallery: https://lonelyguy.tech/gallery
- Search index JSON: https://lonelyguy.tech/search-index.json
- Site index JSON: https://lonelyguy.tech/site-index.json

## Projects
- [Syntagma](https://lonelyguy.tech/projects/syntagma): Agentic curriculum lifecycle management system for PES University. Faculty submit raw course content, the agent refines it into structured records, the 36-tool editor lets admins propose reviewable edits, and every state is snapshotable with full diff history and official A4 PDF output.
- [Raijin LOB](https://lonelyguy.tech/projects/raijin-lob): C++ limit order book engine built around low-latency market microstructure ideas, benchmarked publicly and now moving toward a simulator phase.
- [Project Halide](https://lonelyguy.tech/projects/project-halide): Small-model diagnostic workbench for damaged film scans using MiniCPM-V, Nemotron-Mini, strict validation, overlays, telemetry, and a Gradio light-table UI.
- [Cybersec OpenEnv](https://lonelyguy.tech/projects/cybersec-openenv): Long-horizon cyber-defense POMDP for training and evaluating small LLM SOC agents with GRPO, realistic attack chains, and reward-hacking resistant containment incentives.
- [Breakout-DQN](https://lonelyguy.tech/projects/breakout-dqn): From-scratch Atari Breakout DQN study for building intuition around deep RL, preprocessing, replay, target networks, and early DeepMind-style agent design.

## Articles
- [Syntagma, Building An Agentic Curriculum Lifecycle Management System](https://lonelyguy.tech/articles/2026-07-22-syntagma): A production-grade curriculum management platform for PES University: agentic refinement, 36-tool editor with reviewable drafts, git-like versioning, Jinja2-powered A4 PDFs, and a deliberately vanilla frontend.
- [Project Halide, Building A Small-Model Diagnostic Workbench For Damaged Film](https://lonelyguy.tech/articles/2026-06-16-project-halide): An open-weight film diagnostics workbench built around MiniCPM-V 4.6, Nemotron-Mini-4B, real negative failure cases, and a validator that became as important as the model.
- [Teaching a 1.5B LLM to be a SOC Analyst (Without Burning Down the Network)](https://lonelyguy.tech/articles/2026-05-01-llm-soc-analyst): Fine-tuning a 1.5B LLM with GRPO to defend against realistic enterprise attack chains, and the unexpected lessons learned from reward hacking.

## Updates
- [June 2026 Updates - Raijin, Halide, Shiori, Android, and Simulation](https://lonelyguy.tech/updates/2026-06-23-updates): Progress update covering Raijin phase one, Project Halide, a Shiori Chrome extension, Android system work, competitive programming, and simulation work.
- [Hackathons + Humanoid Simulation + UAV Conference + Breakout](https://lonelyguy.tech/updates/2026-04-11-updates): Qualified for some interesting hackathons, Good progress is being done on training the humanoid robot + Will be attending a UAV conference + Breakout might have to wait a bit.
- [playing around with an arm and a biped and rl](https://lonelyguy.tech/updates/2026-03-18-biped): wanted to test the update page, so though might as well log about the biped, this is more of a random update.
